name: agentic-pipeline
description: Multi-stage agent pipeline runner for Claude Code with three human-approval gates, an automated policy stage, an independent verifier, and a resumable run log.

plugins.name: agentic-pipeline
plugins.description: Multi-stage agent pipeline runner. /pipeline-init onboards a project; /new-run + /run-pipeline orchestrate research → plan → test-write → execute → policy → verify → manager with three human-approval gates. v0.2 adds the module-release pipeline (Phase 0 infrastructure preflight + Phase 2 local rehearsal + self-classification rules). v0.3 adds the dual-AI audit-handoff discipline (/audit-init scaffolds shared 5-lens self-audit + audit gate + audit protocol for projects where one AI implements and a different AI audits). v0.4 adds the judge layer — opt-in real-time action supervision inside the executor stage; classify → judge → execute inner loop with four verdicts (allow / block / revise / escalate), context-isolated from the executor's reasoning chain.
